title: Bitter Gooey Peruvian Egg Stir-fry
description: This halal-friendly dish features a mix of bitter vegetables in an egg-based sauce that is both gooey and romantic, perfect for a special evening meal.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Roast in a dry pan until fragrant and lightly browned.

instructions: Slice the bitter melon into thin rounds and slice the onion finely. Roast the garlic until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
In a wok or large skillet, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add roasted garlic and cook for another minute.
Add sliced onions to the wok and stir-fry until translucent, about 2-3 minutes. Push onions to one side of the pan.
Beat the eggs in a small bowl. Pour beaten eggs into the hot wok, stirring quickly with a wooden spoon to create an egg foam over the bitter melon slices.
Drizzle soy sauce and sugar over the mixture, stirring well until the bitterness from the vegetables is absorbed, about 1-2 minutes. The mixture should be thick and gooey.
Mix in the bitter melon rounds and continue cooking for another minute or two to cook the edges of the melon.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
